summary: Admin dashboard project with Applications table management, featuring Refresh button (mobile-compatible), active count sync, Set Price functionality, and admin login system.
architectural_notes: Admin credentials: vijay@123 / vijay@2026 must remain functional
Refresh button must use server-side API call to re-fetch Applications table data (no cache)
Set Price action must persist amount and be immediately visible to customers without auth errors
known_issues: Refresh button does not update data on OnePlus (and likely other mobile browsers)
Active count shows '00' instead of real submission count after refresh
Set Price returns 'Unauthorized' errors and amount may not save correctly

existing_features.title: Rewrite the Refresh button handler in AdminPage.tsx to forcefully invalidate and re-fetch all application data from the backend (bypassing any cache). The refetch must use React Query's refetch with staleTime=0 and must work correctly on all mobile browsers including Chrome on OnePlus/Android devices. After clicking Refresh, the application list must visibly update with the latest rows from the Applications table.

Fix the active submission count display in the AdminPage so that after clicking Refresh, the count immediately reflects the real number of submitted applications instead of showing '00'. The count must be derived directly from the freshly fetched application data.

Fix the Set Price mutation in useQueries.ts and AdminPage.tsx so that submitting a fee (e.g., 200) does not return an 'Unauthorized' error. The admin actor must be properly authenticated before calling the setFee backend function. After a successful Set Price call, the updated fee must be immediately visible to customers on the DashboardPage without requiring a page reload.

Ensure the admin login credentials vijay@123 (username: vijay, password: 123) and vijay@2026 (username: vijay, password: 2026) both continue to work in the useAdminAuth.ts hook. Do not remove or alter these hardcoded credentials. The 24-hour session stored in localStorage must remain intact.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix Refresh button to forcefully re-fetch latest rows from Applications table, working on all mobile browsers including OnePlus
Sync active count: clicking Refresh must immediately update '00' to the real number of submissions
Fix Set Price button so 200 amount is saved and visible to customers immediately, removing Unauthorized errors
Maintain admin login credentials: vijay@123 / vijay@2026
